name: Gil Askey
description: American-born musician, composer, producer and musical director (1925-2014)
abstract: Gilbert Askey (March 9, 1925 – April 9, 2014) was an American jazz trumpeter, composer, producer and musical director who was born in Austin, Texas, and emigrated to Australia in 1988.

about_quotes.speaker: Slide Hampton
about_quotes.evidence: when Gil Askey or myself wanted to write something different, he was very encouraging.
about_quotes.doc_title: Slide Hampton — Smithsonian Jazz Oral History

about_quotes.speaker: J. C. Higginbotham
about_quotes.evidence: [INTERVIEWER] Did you know Gil Askey? [INTERVIEWER] I did but not that much.
